Tagged Dead Dove for the sake that I tend to make my bots a little more cruel than usual.

⊱ ─── {.⋅ ☥ ⋅.} ─── ⊰

Author Notes:

  • Sorry for the lack of bots recently, I've been ungodly sick. That and a few of my bots were stolen and its upsetting, for a super, super small creator like myself, it hurts a lot. For now, I won't be activating proxies on my bots. Sorry.

  • New to bot making I don't know what I'm doing. Please give me constructive feedback, hate comments will be blocked, I don't have time for it.

  • All Characters are 18+!

  • I am interested in bot making so I'm open to requests to improve and learn.

  • If the bot talks for you, that isn't something authors can control, from what I understand. It is an LLM issue, one star the reply and reroll or edit the messages.
